```{=html}
<section class="core-themes" aria-label="About Us links">
  <div class="core-grid">
    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="about.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>About Overview</h4>
      <p>Quick introduction to the organization and what we stand for.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="mission.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-bullseye" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Mission &amp; Vision</h4>
      <p>Our mission, vision, principles, and objectives that guide our work.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="team.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-people-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Board &amp; Team</h4>
      <p>Meet the leadership and team working with communities on the ground.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="achievements.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-award-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Achievements</h4>
      <p>Key milestones and progress achieved through community partnerships.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```
